'''Talas''' was a dry, rocky, [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world located in the [[Kamdon system/Legends|Kamdon system]] in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]]. It was the headquarters of [[Tallet]] and [[Lekket]].

{{Planet-stub}}
